SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlottery

Class AdminNotificationLogItemTemporary

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlottery.AdminNotificationLogItemTemporary
public class AdminNotificationLogItemTemporary extends Object
Class is used to temporarily store admin notification item records all the notification information title, message, sender, related event, send time used when displaying admin notification log information screen

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AdminNotificationLogItemTemporary(long notificationsenttimeinput, String notificationtitleinput, String notificationmessageinput, String notificationrelatedeventidinput, String notificationsendernameinput, String notificationrelatedeventnameinput, String notificationidinput)
    constructor

    Full constructor including receiver name (resolved asynchronously after construction).

  • Constructor Details

    • AdminNotificationLogItemTemporary

      public AdminNotificationLogItemTemporary(long notificationsenttimeinput, String notificationtitleinput, String notificationmessageinput, String notificationrelatedeventidinput, String notificationsendernameinput, String notificationrelatedeventnameinput, String notificationidinput)
      constructor
      Parameters:
      notificationsenttimeinput - time when the notification was sent
      notificationtitleinput - title of the notification
      notificationmessageinput - message of the notification
      notificationrelatedeventidinput - id of the related event
      notificationsendernameinput - name of the sender
      notificationrelatedeventnameinput - name of the related event
      notificationidinput - id of the notification

    • AdminNotificationLogItemTemporary

      public AdminNotificationLogItemTemporary(long notificationsenttimeinput, String notificationtitleinput, String notificationmessageinput, String notificationrelatedeventidinput, String notificationsendernameinput, String notificationrelatedeventnameinput, String notificationidinput, String notificationreceivernameinput)
      Full constructor including receiver name (resolved asynchronously after construction).
      Parameters:
      notificationsenttimeinput - time (ms) when the notification was sent
      notificationtitleinput - title of the notification
      notificationmessageinput - body message of the notification
      notificationrelatedeventidinput - Firestore ID of the related event
      notificationsendernameinput - display name of the organizer who sent the notification
      notificationrelatedeventnameinput - display name of the related event
      notificationidinput - Firestore document ID of the notification
      notificationreceivernameinput - display name of the entrant who received the notification

  • Method Details

    • getTime

      public long getTime()
      getter
      Returns:
      the sent time of the notification

      public String getTitle()
      getter
      Returns:
      the notification title

      getter
      Returns:

      public String getEventid()
      getter
      Returns:

      public String getSendername()
      getter
      Returns:
      the sender name

    • getEventname

      public String getEventname()
      getter
      Returns:
      the linked event name

    • getNotificationID

      public String getNotificationID()
      getter
      Returns:
      the notification id

    • getReceiverName

      public String getReceiverName()
      getter
      Returns:
      the receiver (entrant) name

    • setReceiverName

      public void setReceiverName(String name)
      Setter for receiver name (resolved async after construction).
      Parameters:
      name - display name of the entrant who received the notification
